description: Build interactive TUI for worktree navigation: Create pkg/tui package using bubbletea and lipgloss. Implement list view showing projects with their worktrees. Support keyboard navigation (↑/↓ arrows, Enter to select, 'o' to open in VS Code, 'c' to create worktree, 'd' to delete, 'q' to quit). Display worktree info: path, branch, git status indicators (*, ↑, ↓). Use lipgloss for styling (colors, borders). Model should track: selectedIndex, projects, worktrees.
note: TUI implementation complete with bubbletea and lipgloss. All acceptance criteria met: model and view files created, keyboard navigation implemented, status indicators working (*, ↑, ↓), project/worktree hierarchy rendered. Build successful.
acceptance_criteria: pkg/tui directory exists with model.go and view.go files
Implements bubbletea.Model interface with Init, Update, View methods
Model struct tracks selectedIndex, projects, and worktrees map
View renders project list with worktree hierarchy and status indicators
Update handles keyboard: arrows navigate, enter/o open, c create, d delete, q quit

verification.value: Build and run wt to verify interactive TUI navigation works
